headline: AMD's Stock Momentum Climbs As 'Agentic AI' And Gigawatt Megadeals Fuel Surge
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc.‘s stock is demonstrating exceptional relative strength, with rapidly improving technicals amid a highly bullish fundamental outlook from Wall Street. Momentum Surges To The Top Tier Of Rankings The semiconductor giant’s Benzinga Edge Stock Rankings‘ momentum score recently jumped week-on-week from 89.98 to 91.48, securing its place in the top tier. The momentum ranking measures a stock’s relative strength based on its price movement patterns and volatility over multip
